title: Wealizh
description: An industrial-themed mod with imagination, featuring various minerals and machinery
body:
# Overview
- This is a technology mod that leans towards an industrial style and incorporates some imaginative elements. 
- It will not significantly alter the gameplay of the original Minecraft, but rather add some new content. 
- Most of the content of this mod has real-life prototypes, but it also incorporates some imaginative elements. 
- This mod is a type of game mod that requires long-term gameplay, which means it is quite demanding. 
- This mod mechanism is rather complex, and of course it also offers a degree of flexibility. 
# Content
## Various Blocks and Items
A large number of blocks and items have been added. Among the blocks, there are functional blocks,
construction blocks, and natural blocks, etc. And the items include process items, practical items, and other items, etc. 
## New Production Method
Many items and blocks will be made using the new work blocks (functional blocks).

Common work blocks include: assembly machine, crusher, forging machine, etc.... 
## More Mechanical and Functional Blocks
Mechanics are the core functionality of this mod! 

These mechanical and functional blocks form a complete process system. Of course, if you prefer not to go

through this hassle, you can choose an alternative approach. 
### Taking a Different Path
This mod provides you with many shortcuts and other methods to enable you to skip or complete other
processes more conveniently. 

For instance, you could start by not building a hand-cranked generator. Instead, gather the materials to
create the combustion chamber and other components, skipping the process of hand-cranked power

generation altogether and directly using thermal energy for power. 
### Combined Machinery
A combined machine refers to a machine constructed by assembling multiple blocks together. 

If you are not able to assemble it, you can refer to the screenshots available on CurseForge or Modrinth. 

Some combinations of mechanical components can be customized, such as centrifuges. Their efficiency will
change according to the variation in the number of rotating tubes above them (up to 24 tubes). 
## New Settings and Worldview
These settings and worldviews have completely transformed the single technology of the game! 

This mod features numerous unique settings and a distinct world view, and it is also the main
"concentration area" for imaginative elements. This means that most of the imaginative elements in this
mod are concentrated here. 

Of course, this does not mean that all the settings are purely imaginary, such as the power system. 
## More Explosives
This mod adds more explosives to the game. 

Revenge always brings a sense of satisfaction. Of course... this is just the general case. Buhao! My home wasblown up! 

The large-scale explosion in this mod adopts a different explosion method from the original version. Thismethod is more prone to causing lag compared to the original version, so please be patient and wait. 
## Abundant Progress and Achievements
Most of the progress is actually quite appropriate, but you might not have noticed it. 

In multiplayer games, the progress can indicate your current situation. But if you don't want your friends toconstantly "peek" at your progress, then just forget what I said. 

In fact, the progress can also be your process planning chart. Generally, following the progress flowchart willensure no mistakes. 
## Unexplained Jokes and Abstract MEME
This mod contains some jokes, and most of these jokes are from Chinese websites. 

Most of the jokes and memes are hidden within the achievement system. Some of them are not very funny qwq 
# Others
- The author usually follows a production process of "first shaping - then creating - and finally optimizing". 
- This mod is open to external suggestions, meaning that the author can receive requests for desired Manager; 
# Special Update
## Official Special Update
This special update will be integrated as a formal part of the regular version update, which can be simplyunderstood as "special ordinary update". 

This update may be released during festival periods such as the Dragon Boat Festival, Mid-Autumn Festival,New Year's Day, Spring Festival, Christmas, Halloween and Qingming Festival. Of course, it may also be updated at other times. 
## April Fool's Day Update
This special update is a separate branch and will be released as an appendage-like form within the version list of the regular version. 

Normally, it will be updated on April Fool's Day. Of course, it may also be updated at other times as well.

_(Usually it's for additional updates such as patches.)_
